title: INNOSOL’LEG ACS : Pratiques Innovantes de gestion des Sols adaptées aux systèmes légumiers normands basées sur l’Agriculture de Conservation des Sols
subtitle: Essai de carottes sur buttes enherbées
description: A field experiment evaluating the feasibility of implementing herbaceous ridge cover crops in a soil conservation agriculture system for carrot production. Three cover mixtures and two cover destruction methods were compared to assess weed control, biomass production, soil organic matter inputs, and carrot performance.
